submit.title: Head of PMO & Strategic Operations
submit.jd_text: We’re Hiring: Head of PMO & Strategic Operations 🇨🇾 | 🇦🇪 Location: Limassol, Cyprus OR Dubai, UAE (Hybrid/On-site) Reports to: Chief Operating Officer (COO) Department: Operations / PMO Start-Date ASAP *** FinTech, Payment, PSP, Background Required*** About the Role: As the Head of PMO, you’ll be the central point for the COO, turning strategic vision into a structured, visible, and predictable execution roadmap. You’ll oversee the end-to-end Payment Integration Lifecycle, coordinating the high-stakes intersection of Product, Engineering, Sales, and Compliance. What You’ll Do: -Strategic Oversight: Serve as the COO’s “Single Source of Truth,” delivering executive-level insights via dashboards (Jira/Monday/Tableau) and weekly syncs with department heads. -Integration & Product Delivery: Own PSP/Bank integrations from API review to Production Go-Live. Standardize processes to reduce Time-to-Market for new payment rails. -Operational Excellence: Proactively manage at-risk projects, align with regulatory standards (PCI DSS, PSD2), and ensure agile governance across teams. Who We’re Looking For: -5+ years in Project/Program Management, with 3+ in Fintech/Payments; 1+ years leading teams of 2+. -Strong technical literacy in API architectures, Webhooks, and payment flows. -Expert in Jira/Confluence and PMO software. -Degree in Business, Engineering, or Computer Science; PMP, PRINCE2, or Agile certifications preferred. Willingness to adapt to new locations and immerse in the fintech ecosystem. If you’re passionate about driving operational excellence in a fast-paced payments environment and turning strategy into action, we want to hear from you! Are you interested in helping shape the future of payments? Please apply...

submit.title: Head of CRM (Next-Gen, AI-Driven)
submit.jd_text: We are Global Print-on-Demand (Global POD), the Dubai-based subsidiary of The Customization Group . We bring cutting-edge and scalable top-tier print-on-demand solutions to businesses and creators worldwide. Fast, sustainable, and hassle-free — because your vision deserves the best! The Customization Group is a global leader in mass customization, leveraging AI and automation to revolutionize the personalized products industry. With a strong international presence across Europe, North America, and the Middle East , we manufacture up to 2.500.000 unique products daily , reaching millions of customers through 20+ own online shops and 1,000+ partner stores . Our AI-first strategy drives efficiency, scalability, and innovation , keeping us ahead in a fast-moving market while growing through AI-driven acquisitions and partnerships . Our diverse team of 700+ professionals from 40+ nationalities thrives in a culture of collaboration and ambition. Whether in our tech hubs, production facilities, or business locations, you’ll find the perfect environment to take ownership and drive impact in the future of e-commerce. TCG is looking for an exceptional Head of CRM to lead the transformation of our global customer engagement strategy. You’ll drive intelligent automation, experimentation, and data-led innovation across all brands and markets. Why You Will Love Working With Us Competitive salary – Commission & performance-based bonuses! Global Exposure – Work with an international team and gain valuable cross-market experience Rapid Career Growth – A role that evolves quickly, opening doors to new opportunities Supportive Work Environment – Join a dynamic and collaborative team culture Ownership for your ideas to fuel your ambition Private Health Insurance A modern office in Dubai Internet City About The Role As our Head Of CRM , you’ll set the global vision and lead two teams - CRM Marketing and CRM Automations - toward a world where customer experiences are personalized, anticipatory, and continuously optimized with AI and automation. You'll build a modern CRM ecosystem that uses data, experimentation, and smart technology to deepen customer relationships and deliver predictable, scalable revenue. This includes championing new tools, integrating emerging AI capabilities, streamlining workflows, and raising the bar on quality, speed, and impact. Customer & Experience Focus • Ensure a seamless and consistent omnichannel experience across voice, chat, email, messaging apps, and social channels. • Reduce customer effort by simplifying processes and leveraging automation. • Use analytics and customer insights to proactively address pain points. They need someone who has built, shipped, and scaled AI systems in production. review.title: Programmatic Director / Head of Programmatic
review.jd_text: Chain Reaction is an award-winning digital marketing agency based in GCC and Levant. We develop bespoke digital strategies to help our clients achieve their growth goals, bringing together online marketing techniques including Online Advertising, SEO, Content Marketing, Social Media, Influencer Marketing, and more. Chain Reaction is looking for a Programmatic Director who will be responsible for building, owning, and scaling the agency's programmatic and AdTech offering from the ground up. This role will act as the central programmatic authority across the agency—shaping product strategy, enabling business units, supporting client pitches, and onboarding best-in-class AdTech platforms and partners. This position sits at the intersection of strategy, technology, and revenue growth, working directly with business unit heads and client leadership teams to translate programmatic and data capabilities into clear business outcomes for advertisers. This role is ideal for a hands-on programmatic leader who enjoys building frameworks, influencing stakeholders, and solving complex client problems, while remaining deeply involved in platform architecture and execution design. Requirements Key Responsibilities 1. Programmatic & AdTech Strategy Define and own the agency's programmatic vision and roadmap, aligned to client growth and business objectives Design scalable programmatic frameworks across display, video, CTV, audio, DOOH, and emerging channels Establish best practices for audience strategy, activation, measurement, and optimization 2. Publisher Relationship Management Build and maintain direct relationships with premium publishers, CTV platforms, and supply partners Act as the agency's primary point of contact for strategic publisher discussions Collaborate with publishers to: Develop custom, verticalized, and audience-led deals Access premium and differentiated inventory Align supply packages with advertiser objectives Evaluate publisher performance and optimize partnerships based on quality, scale, and results 3. Client Strategy & Business Enablement Partner closely with Business Unit Heads and Client Leads to support: New business pitches and RFPs Strategic client roadmaps and annual planning Complex programmatic and data-led proposals Act as a programmatic advisor to key clients, helping them understand how AdTech and data can drive incremental growth Translate technical programmatic capabilities into simple, outcome-oriented client narratives 4. AdTech Platform & Partner Onboarding Evaluate, Onboard, and manage programmatic platforms and AdTech partners, including: DSPs, SSPs, CTV platforms CDPs / DMPs Identity, data, and measurement partners Own partner relationships, commercial structures, and platform governance Ensure platforms are integrated into agency workflows and client offerings in a scalable, compliant manner 5. review.title: Business Engagement Director of Data & AI
review.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
review.jd_text: Are you passionate about harnessing data to power business transformation? We're looking for a visionary Business Engagement Director of Data & AI to connect business strategy with data-driven insights and lead impactful change across Miral’s world-class leisure and entertainment portfolio. About the Role: As the Data & AI Director – Analytics Business Engagement , you will act as a strategic bridge between Miral’s business units and our data analytics team. You will drive stakeholder engagement, identify high-impact analytics opportunities, and ensure data solutions directly support business goals across all Miral tenants. What You’ll Do: Champion strategic engagement with business leaders to identify data needs and align on priorities Drive analytics adoption by translating complex insights into actionable business recommendations Lead cross-functional data projects from ideation to implementation Influence a data-first culture through change management and stakeholder advocacy Monitor KPIs to measure project impact and ensure alignment with business performance goals Promote data governance, process optimization, and data quality standards Stay ahead of trends and bring innovation into how we solve business challenges through data What You Bring: 10+ years of experience in business engagement or data analytics (with at least 5 years in a leadership role) Strong stakeholder management and communication skills with a passion for storytelling with data Hands-on experience with data tools such as Power BI, Tableau, SQL, and DWH platforms Strategic thinker with a sharp understanding of performance drivers in large organizations Experience driving data adoption and leading change initiatives across diverse teams Bachelor’s degree in Business, Data Science, Analytics, or a related field (Master’s preferred) Why Join Miral Experiences? Miral Experiences is the creative force behind Abu Dhabi’s most exciting entertainment, leisure, and cultural destinations, including Yas Island, Ferrari World, SeaWorld, and more. Here, data isn’t just numbers—it’s what fuels our future. Join us in shaping unforgettable experiences through insights that matter.

review.title: Head of E-Commerce & Omnichannel
review.jd_text: Our client is a regional retail group operating across physical stores, marketplaces, and direct-to-consumer channels. The business views digital commerce as a core growth engine and is investing heavily in platforms and customer experience. The Role The Head of E-Commerce & Omnichannel will own the digital revenue stream across all online channels. This role will oversee platform performance, customer acquisition, conversion optimisation, and digital merchandising. A key mandate will be integrating online and offline experiences to create a seamless omnichannel journey. The role will manage cross-functional teams across marketing, technology, and operations. This position will also lead partnerships with marketplaces, payment providers, and logistics partners. Profitability, scalability, and data-driven decision-making will be central to the roles success. Candidate Profile Candidates must have senior experience in e-commerce or digital commerce within retail or consumer environments. Strong understanding of digital funnels, UX, performance marketing, and analytics is essential. Experience scaling e-commerce in the UAE or regional markets is highly preferred. The ideal candidate combines commercial ownership with digital execution capability. Leadership experience managing multidisciplinary teams is required. A customer-centric mindset and strong stakeholder management skills are critical.
